description: Style NoteFinally a pair of sports sandals that understand just what your feet need. This Yorgio floaters from adidas come equipped with tough felt straps and a curved and grooved footbed (to withstand rough use). The heel region is curved inward so as to prevent mud/sand from entering the sandal. The lugs on the outsole are designed to stay grippy on any terrain - now you know what's the right foot style choice for this monsoon!Product DetailsPerforated synthetic straps for the forefoot, midfoot and ankle loop with Velcro closures and a pull loop at the heel collarA grooved and padded footbedA tough TPU outsole, upraised at the heel, with multidirectional lugs all overMaterial and careSynthetic, rubberWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
